The '''''Rintonne's Flame''''' was an obsolete [[Bayonet-class light cruiser]] serving in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. It was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dongal Tezrin]].

==Appearances==
*[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
